[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: The LawPro+ Men’s Poly-Cotton Long Sleeve Shirt delivers breathable comfort and professional style with durable stitching, functional epaulets, and a modernized fit—perfect for law enforcement and public service professionals. 
 Features of Men's LawPro Poly / Cotton Long Sleeve Shirt 
 - Material: 65% Polyester / 35% Cotton (4.6 oz) 
 - Stitched-in military creases maintain a sharp, professional appearance 
 - Permanent collar stays for a polished look 
 - Fit: Modernized fit for enhanced comfort in the body, chest, and arms 
 - Increased shoulder length for improved range of motion 
 - Closure Type: Button-up front 
 - Collar Style: Traditional pointed collar with permanent stays
